phase: 인벤토리(Inventory) - Phase 1 착수 가능 상태 (Phase 0 완료)
purpose: Compact execution manifest. Development phase — Tomcat/session checks skipped by default. Eclipse Publish is a manual milestone step.

dev_workflow.description: During React migration (Phase 1-3), automation targets :3000 dev server. Eclipse Publish + :8080 verification is a manual milestone check.

preferred_flow.reason: Development phase — skip Tomcat/session checks, validate routing/docs/build only.

fallback_flow.use_when: Use when npm run build is not needed (no source changes) or build environment is unavailable.

milestone_flow.description: Run manually after Eclipse Publish to verify :8080 deployment.
milestone_flow.use_when: After Eclipse Publish at migration milestones (e.g. phase cutover, QA review).

known_constraints: Tomcat runs on Windows; WSL automation accesses it via 172.26.208.1:8080.
Eclipse Publish is required to sync webapp/ui/ to the running Tomcat instance — this is a manual milestone step.
UTF-8 mojibake preflight blocks corrupted Hangul before build/doc sync.
Playwright capture requires elevated permission (spawn EPERM risk in sandbox).
src/main/frontend exists and npm install is complete — bootstrap-frontend already run.
